EntityDefinition.Name: ModelEntity
EntityDefinition.Author: Simio Employee
EntityDefinition.Description: The default entity definition for your project.

NodeDefinition.Name: BasicNode
NodeDefinition.Author: Simio Employee
NodeDefinition.Description: A BasicNode object may be used by an entity to transfer into or out of an object. This type of node may also be used to define an intersection point in a network of links.

FixedDefinition.Name: Resource
FixedDefinition.Author: Simio Employee
FixedDefinition.Description: A Resource object may be used to model a resource constraint with capacity that can be seized and released by other objects.

FixedDefinition.Name: Server
FixedDefinition.Author: Simio Employee
FixedDefinition.Description: A Server object may be used to model a capacity-constrained processing location. Operations performed at the server can be modeled as either a processing time or as a sequence of tasks. Secondary resources or material requirements may be optionally specified.

FixedDefinition.Name: Sink
FixedDefinition.Author: Simio Employee
FixedDefinition.Description: A Sink object may be used to destroy entities that have finished processing in the model.

FixedDefinition.Name: Source
FixedDefinition.Author: Simio Employee
FixedDefinition.Description: A Source object may be used to generate entities of a specified type.

NodeDefinition.Name: TransferNode
NodeDefinition.Author: Simio Employee
NodeDefinition.Description: A TransferNode object may be used by an entity to transfer into or out of an object. This type of node may also be used to define an intersection point in a network of links. Optional entity destination selection and transport logic is provided.

TransporterDefinition.Name: Vehicle
TransporterDefinition.Author: Simio Employee
TransporterDefinition.Description: A Vehicle object may be used to transport entities between node locations. Additionally, an 'On Demand' routing type vehicle may be used as a moveable resource that is seized and released for non-transport related tasks by model process logic.

TransporterDefinition.Name: Worker
TransporterDefinition.Author: Simio Employee
TransporterDefinition.Description: A Worker object may be used as a moveable resource that is seized and released for tasks by model process logic. Additionally, a worker may be used to transport entities between node locations.
